audit_items.proof_trace: Double-free vulnerability: line 1557 calls uprv_free(p) where p aliases regions pointer, causing regions to be freed twice (once in loop iteration when p==regions, again at line 1559). Should be uprv_free(*p) to free individual strings.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malformed resource bundle data triggers region processing error, executing cleanup code path that double-frees regions array, potentially enabling code execution.
